title: jasminum floribundum var. steudneri
intro: Jasminum floribundum var. steudneri, also known as Steudner's Jasmine or Star Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its fragrant, star-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Steudner's Jasmine contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that have been reported to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, providing potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
